plugin.name: Squiddio
plugin.summary: Repository of sailing destination waypoints and Bouy Reports
plugin.author: Mauro Calvi
plugin.description: Squiddio Plugin makes its global user-sourced and user-maintained repository of sailing destinations (marinas, anchorages, yacht clubs, docks, fuel stations etc.) available as waypoints in OpenCPN. OpenCPN Android comes with sQuiddio built in.

plugin.name: Squiddio
plugin.summary: Repository of sailing destination waypoints and Bouy Reports
plugin.author: Mauro Calvi
plugin.description: Squiddio Plugin makes its global user-sourced and user-maintained repository of sailing destinations (marinas, anchorages, yacht clubs, docks, fuel stations etc.) available as waypoints in OpenCPN. OpenCPN Android comes with sQuiddio built in.

plugin.description: Squiddio Plugin makes its global user-sourced and user-maintained repository of sailing destinations (marinas, anchorages, yacht clubs, docks, fuel stations etc.) available as waypoints in OpenCPN. OpenCPN Android comes with sQuiddio built in.

plugin.description: Squiddio Plugin makes its global user-sourced and user-maintained repository of sailing destinations (marinas, anchorages, yacht clubs, docks, fuel stations etc.) available as waypoints in OpenCPN. OpenCPN Android comes with sQuiddio built in.

plugin.name: testplugin
plugin.summary: Plugin to test examples of the ODAPI and JSON interface for ODRAW 1234#
plugin.author: Jon Gough
plugin.description: testplugin Plugin is used to test out the ODraw API and demonstrate how to use it successfully from another plugin

plugin.name: testplugin
plugin.summary: Plugin to test examples of the ODAPI and JSON interface for ODRAW 1234#
plugin.author: Jon Gough
plugin.description: testplugin Plugin is used to test out the ODraw API and demonstrate how to use it successfully from another plugin

plugin.name: VDR
plugin.summary: Voyage Data Recorder and Player
plugin.author: Jean-Eudes Onfray
plugin.description: VDR Voyage Data Recorder Use Voyage Data Recorder (VDR) to record and play NMEA files. Save NMEA stream to a file. Replay NMEA stream previously saved. Plugin by Seth Dart

plugin.name: VDR
plugin.summary: Voyage Data Recorder and Player
plugin.author: Jean-Eudes Onfray
plugin.description: VDR Voyage Data Recorder Use Voyage Data Recorder (VDR) to record and play NMEA files. Save NMEA stream to a file. Replay NMEA stream previously saved. Plugin by Seth Dart

plugin.name: WeatherFax
plugin.summary: Open fax image files or decode audio faxes and overlay on chart
plugin.author: Sean d'Epagnier
plugin.description: Weatherfax Plugin has simple calibration for image overly, Converts images, and can convert any image into a raster chart. Db for HF radio fax stations via SSB and Metro URL internet retrieval.

plugin.name: WeatherFax
plugin.summary: Open fax image files or decode audio faxes and overlay on chart
plugin.author: Sean d'Epagnier
plugin.description: Weatherfax Plugin has simple calibration for image overly, Converts images, and can convert any image into a raster chart. Db for HF radio fax stations via SSB and Metro URL internet retrieval.

plugin.name: WeatherRouting
plugin.summary: Plugin to complete optimal routing with weather files
plugin.author: Sean d'Epagnier
plugin.description: Weather_Routing Plugin optimizes weather routing
